title: App Release Notes
purpose: Copy the release notes for the latest version of an app shared from the App Store.

title: Save App Store Icon
purpose: Search the App Store for an app and save its icon to the Photos app.

title: App Store Story as Safari Reader Article
purpose: Read an App Store story (from the ‘Today’ tab) as a text-only webpage, cleaned up by Safari Reader.

title: EverSafari
purpose: A comprehensive menu to save webpages from Safari as notes in Evernote.

title: Save Quote to Evernote
purpose: Save selections from Safari webpages as highlights in Evernote.

title: Clip to iCloud Clipboard
purpose: Clip any kind of text contained in the system clipboard to a Clipboard.

title: Compress Dropbox Files
purpose: Pick multiple files from Dropbox and share them as a single.

title: Preview Folder Contents
purpose: Preview the contents of a folder stored inside iCloud Drive/Shortcuts.

title: Calendar Locations
purpose: Get a list of upcoming calendar events that contain locations.

title: Create Calendar Event from Template
purpose: Create a new calendar event choosing from a list of templates.

title: Days In a Month
purpose: List of months and how many days they have.

title: Invert Names
purpose: Given a list of last and first names separated by a comma, the shortcut inverts their position and returns a plain text list of first names followed by last...

title: Electricity Price
purpose: Uses the ComEd Current Hour Average electricity price API for Northern Illinois to return the average price of electricity for the current hour in USD.

title: Parse JSON Feed
purpose: Parse any JSON feed and display a list of recent posts to choose from.

title: URL Cleaner
purpose: Clean up URLs by removing tracking parameters from them.

title: WordleBot
purpose: Reformat results for a completed Wordle game to include scores for partial and perfect guesses on each line.

title: Masto-Redirect
purpose: Redirect user profiles and individual posts from their original Mastodon instance back to your own instance.

title: Start Toggl Timer
purpose: Start a new timer in your Toggl account.
